title: Feature: hex stdb — direct SpacetimeDB query CLI

steps.description: Add StdbAction enum and `hex stdb` subcommand skeleton to hex-cli/src/commands/stdb.rs with `query` and `tables` subcommands. Wire into hex-cli/src/main.rs command router. No logic yet — just argument parsing with --db, --json, --count flags.
steps.done_condition: cargo check passes; hex stdb --help prints usage without error

steps.description: Implement `hex stdb query <SQL>` in stdb.rs: POST to /v1/database/{db}/sql, parse schema+rows JSON response, render as aligned table (headers + rows). Use HEX_SPACETIMEDB_HOST env / default 127.0.0.1:3033. Handle 0-row result (print headers + '(0 rows)'). Handle HTTP errors with friendly message.
steps.done_condition: hex stdb query 'SELECT * FROM project' prints formatted table; hex stdb query 'SELECT * FROM project' --json prints raw JSON; error cases exit non-zero with message

steps.description: Implement `hex stdb tables` in stdb.rs: query 'SELECT table_name FROM information_schema.tables' or equivalent SpacetimeDB introspection query. Print one table name per line. Add --db flag support.
steps.done_condition: hex stdb tables lists table names; hex stdb tables --db inference-gateway lists inference-gateway tables

steps.description: Implement --count flag in query subcommand: print only the integer row count and exit. Add --db flag resolution: --db flag > HEX_SPACETIMEDB_DATABASE env > 'hex' default.
steps.done_condition: hex stdb query 'SELECT * FROM project' --count prints integer; --db inference-gateway targets correct database

steps.description: Add MCP tool hex_stdb_query to hex-cli MCP server: accepts sql (string) and db (optional string, default 'hex'), returns rows as JSON array. Wire into mcp_tools dispatch. Document in CLAUDE.md tool table.
steps.done_condition: mcp__hex__hex_stdb_query tool callable from Claude Code; returns parsed rows array

steps.description: Integration: merge all branches into main in order (step-1 → step-2, step-3 → step-4, step-5). Run cargo build --workspace. Run hex stdb query 'SELECT * FROM project' end-to-end against live SpacetimeDB. Verify all specs S01-S10.
steps.done_condition: cargo build succeeds; all 10 specs verified manually or via smoke test

mergeOrder: step-2 and step-3 parallel (both depend on step-1 only)
step-4 and step-5 parallel (both depend on step-2)

riskRegister.risk: SpacetimeDB introspection query for table listing may differ by version
riskRegister.mitigation: Test against local STDB; fallback to hardcoded known table list if introspection fails

riskRegister.risk: Column alignment breaks on very wide values
riskRegister.mitigation: Truncate cells to terminal width; always available via --json for full data

successCriteria: hex stdb query 'SELECT * FROM project' shows the project table contents as a formatted table
hex stdb tables lists all tables in the hex database
hex stdb query ... --db inference-gateway targets the correct database
Command works when hex-nexus is not running
mcp__hex__hex_stdb_query returns parsed rows usable in Claude Code sessions
